test_framework: No formal test suite; verification is via streamlit run (import check) and syntax validation
test_command: python -c "import app; import utils.data_engine; import utils.ai_client; import utils.visualizations; import utils.exporters; import utils.data_loader; import utils.styles; import utils.ai_insights; import utils.report_generator; import utils.time_intelligence; import utils.validation; import utils.supabase_client; import utils.database; import utils.persistence; import utils.online_data; import utils.data_generator; print('All imports OK')"
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -r requirements.txt (installs new deps). 2. python -c with all util imports. 3. python -m py_compile on each new file.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to install packages. Python 3.11 available via pyenv.
contribution_requirements: New session_state keys initialized in app.py with if key not in st.session_state. raw_df is NEVER mutated. All Gemini calls wrapped in try/except with fallback. No logic in page files - business logic in utils/. DB changes use ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS only.
key_patterns: Pages use st.set_page_config() as first call, then inject_global_css(), then ensure_builtin_data()/init_all_session_state(). Utils are pure functions (no Streamlit imports at top except where needed for caching). AI calls use utils/ai_client.py generate_content(). Data cleaning uses apply_cleaning_step() pattern. Export uses render_export_buttons(). Supabase uses (ok, payload) tuple pattern from utils/database.py. Charts use utils/visualizations.py functions. Styles in utils/styles.py with render_ helpers.
directory_structure: app.py (entry + session init), pages/ (10 Streamlit pages numbered 0-9), utils/ (14 module files), data/ (built-in CSV), .streamlit/ (config.toml, secrets template), SUPABASE_SETUP.md (SQL schema + guide)
